author: clover caruso <git@paperclover.net>
message:
chore: remove my stale TODO assignments (#30685)

> tldr; changes `// TODO(@paperclover):` --> `// TODO:`, plus some
extras

congrats on the rust port! i haven't really been contributing to the
project since i left the company (and, unfortunately, most open source).
looking over most of these TODOs, the issues still seem valid. the best
course of action is to anonymize them so a future agent can tackle them
one day.

with the couple of comments that point to me for feedback, i've decided
to just resolve those. the crazy builtins bundler system got a little
bit of documentation, which is documented as well as i can recall it.

i remember almost all of my theory from the Dev Server, which was a
project slowly brewing in my head since way before i ever joined the
original company. it's such a beautiful architecture. i'll always be
down to explaining it to anyone who wishes to learn, so that comment now
points to a scoped email address.

the old zig code is left untouched -- don't want to merge conflict lol.

i want to thank all of the people i've worked with in the past, and
specifically shout-out dylan, zack, meg, and of course jarred. truly
incredible work experience. but these days i spend most of my free time
living in an isolated universe, mostly working on art and music. at
work, i work on a user-facing application with bun; it's simple yet
fulfilling to me.

clover caruso🩵
